title: Swipe right, next screen
scenario: Verify that swiping right through the Quick Start Guide screens displays the correct content (second screen with two earbuds, third screen with charge case outside, fourth screen with charge case inside) matching the Figma design.
steps: Swipe right to navigate through the Quick Start Guide screens.
Swipe from the right side to advance through the screens.
expected: The screen should show: second screen with two earbuds, third screen with the charge case outside, and fourth screen with the charge case inside. All screens should match the Figma design.
